LAW AND MOTION, 302, DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS CONTINUED TO JULY 14, 2015 AT 9:30 A.M. IN DEPT. 302. THERE IS NO OPPOSITION ON FILE AND THE COURT DID NOT RECEIVE A COURTESY COPY OF THE OPPOSITION PURSUANT TO SAN FRANCISCO LOCAL RULE 2.6B. DEFENDANT, HOWEVER, FILED A REPLY BRIEF THAT INDICATES THAT AN OPPOSITION WAS SERVED. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO FILE IMMEDIATELY THE OPPOSITION AND PROVIDE A COURTESY COPY WITH DEPARTMENT 302 WITH A LETTER REFLECTING THE NEW HEARING DATE. JUDGE ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK FELICIA GREEN (302/EHG)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative For Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Jun-09-2015 Continued To Jul-14-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative For Summary Adjudication is continued to July 14, 2015, at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 302. There is no opposition on file and the court did not receive a courtesy copy of the opposition pursuant to San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. Defendant, however, filed a reply brief that indicates that an opposition was served. Plaintiff is ordered to file immediately the opposition and provide a courtesy copy with Department 302 with a letter reflecting the new hearing date. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)
